pattern_description: しらたま・しずく・ひよりがCocoと並んで登場。夏本番の暑さの中でも、関係の温度と距離を整える言葉を24枚。
week_theme: 夏本番——CocoとしらたまE・しずく・ひよりが届ける、暑い夏の距離感を整える24枚
desc_ja: 猛暑の夏もCocoとしらたま・しずく・ひよりが一緒なら、言葉の距離感は崩れない。朝の挨拶から深夜の本音まで、関係の温度を整える24枚。
title_en: Just as You Are, Vol.11 — Together
desc_en: Coco and her three friends bring 24 stamps for midsummer — warm hellos, honest thanks, and quiet encouragement for relationships at any temperature.

stamps.scene: 夏の朝、久しぶりの青空と一緒にそっと届けたい一番やさしい一言
stamps.send_psychology: おはようございますより軽く、温かく朝の挨拶を届けたい
stamps.outfit: 普段着（リネンチュニック＋ワイドパンツ、ナチュラルベージュ）
stamps.color_scheme: モーニングコーラル・サンライズゴールド・フレッシュホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Morning coral and sunrise gold with fresh white — the palette of the first clear morning of summer. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco (stylish 41-year-old woman, sleek bob haircut, cool-beauty features softened by warmth) wearing natural beige linen tunic and wide-leg pants, standing in a relaxed morning pose with one hand raised in a small gentle wave, looking at the viewer with a genuine soft smile. Shirotsuma (fluffy white-and-grey cat) sits at her feet looking up at her with adoring round eyes. Composition: full body, front view, large copy space at top; watercolor morning light radiates softly behind them.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おはよう』in warm coral lettering at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 毎朝、または眠る前にそっと送りたい「今日も」がついた特別な大好き
stamps.send_psychology: 大好きより深くて毎日続く愛情を届けたい
stamps.outfit: パジャマ（淡いピーチ色の花柄パジャマ、髪は少し乱れた自然体）
stamps.color_scheme: ソフトピーチ・ローズゴールド・ドリーミーラベンダー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Soft peach and rose gold with dreamy lavender — the colors of half-awake tenderness. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco in soft peach floral pajamas, hair slightly tousled in a natural relaxed way, sitting cross-legged, pressing both hands to her cheeks with a tender-embarrassed smile — the look of someone who can't help feeling it again. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) is snuggled right against her side, eyes curved into happy crescents. Composition: bust-up, slightly tilted angle, large copy space to the left.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『今日も大好き』in rose-gold flowing lettering with subtle heart drawn in the の, placed top left; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 夏のお誘い・花火・旅行の返信に使いたい弾む気持ちのひとこと
stamps.send_psychology: 楽しみな気持ちを素直に、でもかわいく届けたい
stamps.outfit: お出掛け着（スカイブルーのサマーワンピース・麦わら帽子・サンダル）
stamps.color_scheme: スカイブルー・サンシャインイエロー・クリアホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Sky blue and sunshine yellow with clear white — peak summer excitement. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco in a sky-blue summer sundress with a woven straw hat tilted at a breezy angle, standing on tiptoe with arms slightly open in delighted anticipation, her expression a pure sunlit smile of someone who can't wait. Hiyori (gentle white bird with soft plumage) flies joyfully around her head, wings spread wide, expression equally thrilled. Composition: full body, three-quarter view, large copy space at top right; watercolor sunshine sparkles around them.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『楽しみ〜』with a long trailing 〜 in sunshine yellow, placed at top right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 夏の外出・旅行・帰宅を見送る場面で、心配よりも温かさを込めて
stamps.send_psychology: 心配ではなく愛情として、相手の安全を願いたい
stamps.outfit: 普段着（フォレストグリーンのリブカットソー＋ベージュワイドパンツ）
stamps.color_scheme: フォレストミント・サンドベージュ・ウォームオリーブ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Forest mint and sand beige with warm olive — the palette of a quiet summer afternoon that wants you to come home safe. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco in a forest-green ribbed top and beige wide-leg pants, standing in a calm composed pose with one hand raised at chest height in a gentle parting gesture, expression: warmly composed, not worried — the face of someone who trusts but cares. Shizuku (small wise turtle with a shell decorated in soft olive watercolor rings) sits at her feet looking up steadily with an equally calm protective energy. Composition: full body, slight side angle, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『気をつけてね』in warm olive-green flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 仕事でも日常でも、重くなりすぎない感謝を丁寧に届けたい
stamps.send_psychology: いつもありがとうございますより近く、でも誠実に感謝したい
stamps.outfit: オフィスカジュアル（クリームホワイトのシアーブラウス・テーパードパンツ）
stamps.color_scheme: クリームホワイト・ウォームゴールド・ソフトテラコッタ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Cream white and warm gold with soft terracotta — the palette of sincere professional warmth. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco in a cream sheer blouse and tapered trousers, standing elegantly with one hand placed over her heart and a genuine grateful smile — not performative, but truly moved. Hiyori (gentle white bird) perches delicately on her shoulder, also with a small appreciative bow of the head. Composition: bust-up, front view, large copy space at bottom.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『いつもありがとう』in warm gold lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.dialogue: 本日も笑顔溢れるいちにちになりますように
stamps.scene: ビジネスでも日常でも使える、格調ある朝の祈りと挨拶
stamps.send_psychology: 形式的ではなく、本当に相手の今日が良い日になってほしいと願いながら送る
stamps.outfit: お散歩着（薄いラベンダーのカーディガン＋白のフレアスカート）
stamps.color_scheme: オーロラピンク・モーニングゴールド・デューホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Aurora pink and morning gold with dew white — the luminous palette of a summer morning blessing. Sparkling warm eyes softly closed in quiet prayer, warm and sincere.
[Character] Coco in a lavender cardigan over a white flared skirt, standing in a composed morning pose with both hands pressed gently together at chest level, eyes softly closed in a brief sincere morning blessing — not religious, just truly wishing. Shizuku (small wise turtle, shell decorated with sunrise watercolor pattern in amber and pink) sits beside her feet in an equally composed posture, flippers together. Composition: full body, slightly elevated angle, large copy space above; watercolor sunrise light filters from behind.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『本日も笑顔溢れるいちにちになりますように』in flowing gentle lettering, two-line layout, at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.
stamps.content: 本日も笑顔溢れるいちにちになりますように

stamps.scene: 夏の夜、親しい相手へ力の抜けた夜の挨拶を届けたい
stamps.send_psychology: おやすみなさいより近い距離感で、でも温かく夜を締めくくりたい
stamps.outfit: パジャマ（ラベンダー×白ボーダーのパジャマセット）
stamps.color_scheme: ムーンライトブルー・スターダストシルバー・ナイトラベンダー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Moonlight blue and stardust silver with night lavender — the palette of a peaceful summer evening ending. Sparkling warm eyes softly half-closed with pleasant drowsiness, gentle and cheerful gaze.
[Character] Coco in a lavender-and-white bordered pajama set, sitting with her legs tucked under her in a cozy position, hands cupped gently in front of her, Hiyori nestled softly in her cupped palms with eyes drooping peacefully — both radiating the quiet warmth of a good day ending. Expression: soft, content, sleepy-but-smiling. Composition: close-up view, slightly looking down, large copy space to the right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おやすみ〜』in soft silver-lavender lettering with a trailing 〜, placed at right side; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 猛暑で体調が心配な相手へ、軽くだけど確かな気遣いを届けたい
stamps.send_psychology: 重くなりすぎず、でも相手のことを思っていると伝えたい
stamps.outfit: 部屋着（ハニービスケット色のルーズリネン部屋着）
stamps.color_scheme: ウォームアイボリー・ハニービスケット・テラコッタオレンジ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Warm ivory and honey biscuit with terracotta orange — cozy indoor summer tones. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco in loose honey-colored linen loungewear, sitting casually leaning forward with elbows on knees, face tilted slightly to one side with a naturally inquiring warm expression — genuinely wanting to know. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) sits upright beside her, head also tilted with curious wide eyes. Composition: bust-up close, three-quarter view, large copy space at top left.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『元気？』in warm terracotta lettering with a casual question mark, placed top left; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 夏の挑戦・仕事の新プロジェクト・一歩踏み出したい相手への後押し
stamps.send_psychology: 励ましを重くせず、背中を押してあげたい
stamps.outfit: 普段着（エナジーオレンジのノースリーブニット＋ホワイトパンツ）
stamps.color_scheme: フレッシュグリーン・サンシャインイエロー・エナジーオレンジ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Fresh green, sunshine yellow, and energy orange — summer courage colors. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco in an energy-orange sleeveless knit and white pants, standing with one fist raised forward in a light energetic gesture, face showing the specific warm confidence of someone who's done it themselves and knows it's possible. Shizuku (wise turtle) is at her left side with flippers slightly raised in a mini-cheer. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) is at her right, also with front paws raised cheerleader-style. Composition: full body, slight dynamic lean forward, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『やってみよう』in sunshine-yellow bold handwritten lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 夏バテや仕事の重さに疲れた相手へ、焦らせずゆっくり寄り添う言葉
stamps.send_psychology: 頑張りすぎている相手の荷を軽くしてあげたい
stamps.outfit: 部屋着（ダスクラベンダーのやわらかいルームウェアセット）
stamps.color_scheme: ダスクラベンダー・ペールムーン・ソフトブルーグレー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Dusk lavender and pale moon with soft blue-grey — the quiet palette of late summer evenings when everything slows down. Sparkling warm eyes radiating calm reassurance and soft empathy.
[Character] Coco in soft dusk-lavender lounge set, seated on the floor with legs stretched out gently, one hand resting quietly on her knee, looking to the side with an expression of warm unhurried calm — no urgency, just acceptance and care. Shizuku (wise turtle) walks slowly but steadily beside her, shell catching the soft moonlight, expression equally unhurried and wise. Composition: side view, seated low, large copy space at top right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『少しずつでいい』in pale lavender-grey flowing lettering at top right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 微妙な状況への反応・距離感を保ちたいとき・あえて深入りしないとき
stamps.send_psychology: Cocoらしい絶妙な距離感で、冷たくなりすぎず受け流したい
stamps.outfit: お出掛け着（オールドローズのシルクブラウス＋グレーのスラックス）
stamps.color_scheme: オールドローズ・アンティークゴールド・スレートグレー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Old rose and antique gold with slate grey — the palette of poised, composed summer elegance. Sparkling warm eyes with a precisely calibrated expression — not cold, not warm, but exactly measured.
[Character] Coco in an old-rose silk blouse and slate-grey slacks, standing with perfect posture, head tilted slightly with one perfectly arched eyebrow raised — the expression of someone taking in information without committing to a reaction, utterly composed. Shizuku (wise turtle) beside her has the same measured philosophical look. Composition: three-quarter view, looking sideways, large copy space at left.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ふぅん』in antique gold casual lettering with the small っ feeling of holding back, placed upper right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: ストレートに愛情を届けたい場面、恋愛でも友情でも
stamps.send_psychology: 照れずに素直な愛情を届けたい
stamps.outfit: オフィスカジュアル（ローズピンクのジャケット＋白インナー）
stamps.color_scheme: ローズピンク・コーラルレッド・ソフトゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Rose pink and coral red with soft gold — the warmest most direct palette of love. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze — pure sincere affection.
[Character] Coco in a rose-pink blazer over a white inner, standing with one hand pressed to her heart and the other slightly extended toward the viewer, expression: open, warm, direct — the rare face of someone who has chosen to love openly. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) curls happily at her feet, eyes curved into happy crescents, tail tip flicking with contentment. Composition: full body, slight forward lean, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『大好き』in coral-red bold loving lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 何かを受け取ったとき、誘われたとき、気にかけてもらったとき
stamps.send_psychology: 丁寧すぎず、でも心から喜んでいると伝えたい

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Cherry blossom pink and soft coral with ivory — summer joy in full bloom. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco in a cherry blossom linen shirt and white skirt, standing with both hands raised slightly, palms facing up in a gesture of receiving and delight — a genuine surprised-happy expression as if the good thing just arrived. Hiyori (white bird) flutters joyfully above, Shirotsuma (white cat) bumps up against her leg in solidarity. Composition: three-quarter view, looking upward slightly, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『嬉しいです』in cherry blossom pink flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 夜、悩んでいる相手を緩めてあげたいとき・完璧主義を手放させたいとき
stamps.send_psychology: Cocoらしい余裕で、相手の肩の力を抜いてあげたい

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Midnight grey and soft lavender with warm cream — the relaxed palette of late-night acceptance. Sparkling warm eyes with a relaxed unhurried expression — not dismissive, genuinely at peace.
[Character] Coco in midnight-grey striped pajamas, sitting casually in a gentle shrug pose — one shoulder slightly higher than the other, arms loosely crossed with the lightest accepting half-smile — the expression of someone who has genuinely decided it's fine. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) lies sprawled beside her in the most utterly unbothered cat pose possible. Composition: seated, loose three-quarter view, large copy space to the right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『まぁいいんじゃない』in soft cream lettering with relaxed strokes at right side; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.scene: 夏の外出中、待っている相手への安心の報告

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Sky blue and cloud white with summer green — the breezy palette of summer movement. Sparkling warm eyes, forward-looking, cheerful and confident.
[Character] Coco in a sky-blue and white striped boat-neck shirt with denim pants, in motion — mid-stride with one arm slightly raised as if reporting back, looking over her shoulder with a light confident smile, phone in her other hand (suggested detail). Hiyori (white bird) flies ahead of her as a gentle scout-companion. Composition: full body, side profile in motion, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『無事に向かってます』in sky-blue casual lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.dialogue: 楽しみにしております

[Character] Coco in a navy tailored blazer over a crisp white shirt, standing with excellent posture, both hands clasped gently in front, a composed and genuinely warm smile — the face of someone who means it when they say they're looking forward to it. Shizuku (wise turtle, shell with gold accent watercolor rings) sits beside in an equally composed polite pose. Composition: bust-up, front view, large copy space at bottom.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『楽しみにしております』in gold-accented formal-yet-warm lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.dialogue: 出逢ってくれてありがとう
stamps.scene: 記念日・夏の終わり・特別な感謝を伝えたい瞬間
stamps.send_psychology: 深い感謝と縁への感動を、Cocoと3匹全員の力を借りて届けたい
stamps.outfit: お出掛け着（スターダストゴールドの夜のドレス・華やかだが上品）

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Stardust gold, night ocean blue, and cosmos pink — the most emotionally resonant palette of a summer night when you realize how rare a connection truly is. Sparkling warm eyes filled with genuine moved depth.
[Character] Coco in a stardust-gold elegant evening outfit, standing with both hands over her heart, eyes slightly glistening with genuine emotion — not dramatic, just genuinely moved. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) presses against her right side, Shizuku (wise turtle) stands serenely at her left, Hiyori (white bird) has just landed softly on her shoulder — all four together in quiet warmth. Composition: full body, centered, all four in close warm grouping, large copy space above.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『出逢ってくれてありがとう』in stardust gold emotional lettering, top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.
stamps.content: 出逢ってくれてありがとう

stamps.scene: 相手の特定の行動・癖・言い方への好意を、さりげなく届ける
stamps.send_psychology: 大好きより少し控えめだけど、確かな好意を届けたい

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Warm amber and terracotta with cream white — the palette of noticing something good about someone and not being able to help saying it. Sparkling warm eyes with a side-glance expression — fond but a little surprised at how fond they are.
[Character] Coco in a warm amber knit vest over white shirt, looking slightly to the side with an expression that's trying to stay composed but is clearly charmed — a small involuntary smile, one eyebrow slightly raised. Shirotsuma (fluffy white cat) looks up at her with adoring eyes, as if the feeling is mutual. Composition: bust-up, slight side glance, large copy space at left.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『そういうところ好き』in warm amber casual lettering at upper right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.

stamps.dialogue: 失敗のない人会ったことないよ
stamps.scene: 失敗して落ち込んでいる相手への、否定もせず励ましすぎないCocoらしい言葉
stamps.send_psychology: 「大丈夫」より具体的に、でも重くなりすぎず相手を支えたい

stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Earth brown, mushroom beige, and warm gold — grounded, wise summer afternoon colors. Sparkling warm eyes radiating deep calm wisdom — the eyes of someone who has seen both sides of failure.
[Character] Coco in an earth-brown oversized shirt and moss-green pants, seated in a comfortable position with legs slightly extended, looking directly at the viewer with a calm matter-of-fact expression — not pitying, just genuinely certain of what she's saying. Shizuku (wise turtle) is positioned beside her in an equally sage posture, shell watercolor warm gold in the afternoon light. Composition: seated, direct gaze, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『失敗のない人会ったことないよ』in warm earth-gold lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow. LINE sticker style.
stamps.content: 失敗のない人会ったことないよ

Shizuku (wise turtle) stands beside her with an equally measured nod of recognition. Composition: three-quarter view, slight downward tilt of head (acknowledging), large copy space at top right.
